posts.text:
Same thing is happening to the men's tournament. Transfer portal and NIL feed the rich and starve the poor.  Equity.


StaceyDales (@StaceyDales)

The first round of the women’s NCAA tournament is usually what turns people off. It’s not competitive. And the top teams feel it too. Much respect to the lower seeds.♥️



— https://nitter.net/StaceyDales/status/2035127407569412333#m

It's sad.


Jim Root (@2ndChancePoints)

CBS just openly mocking college hoops fans by making a game of how little their studio crew knows/cares about college hoops



— https://nitter.net/2ndChancePoints/status/2035042486050332960#m
Miami taking nothing but circus shots. Tennessee length and athleticism just too much for Miami. Shots of frustration.

Men who know the LEAST are being paid to speak the MOST. It’s gay.

Video

I explained to @CameronNewton that I'm not trying to be relatable. I'm only trying to serve Jesus Christ.

Video

I expressed to @CameronNewton the legit talent that he has in broadcasting and the potential he has as an impactful voice in the media space.

Video

.@CameronNewton asked me about the untrue pretense that I am more critical of black people than whites.

Video

Fact


Dre Baldwin | #WorkOnYourGame (@DreAllDay)

“Disrespect” is the fragile black man’s cheap justification for aggression.

When you lack composure and verbal control, you escalate — not to resolve the situation, but to protect your ego.

If they back down, you “won.”



— https://nitter.net/DreAllDay/status/2034974384696287635#m

The new WNBA collective bargaining agreement is proof that capitalism does not control America. The alphabet LGBTQIA+ mafia decides the upper American industry, financing organizations like the WNBA to push its agenda.

Video

This is the way.


Tim Adams (@timpadams1)

Congrats to Miami (OH) and its fans. All the debate about how good the RedHawks were (or weren’t) can be laid to rest. Those that gloated that Miami would get killed in the NCAA Tournament were dead wrong. They were the better team last night for sure.

I thought Miami really dominated that game. Not only was their shooting excellent, but their passing was amazing too. 

I’d like to see the NCAA Tournament make a rule that no teams can get an at-large

Gold. Lol.


Shane Tuttle (@ShaneTuttleNCAA)

BREAKING: Arizona G Bryce James will forego the NCAA Tournament to prepare for the 2026 NBA Draft.

The freshman guard averages 0.0 PPG and is currently mocked to the Los Angeles Lakers in the 2nd round.





— https://nitter.net/ShaneTuttleNCAA/status/2034638464038191510#m

Cam was good, too.


robert holley jr (@holleyro)

Great interview with Cam last night Jason. You showed what a true professional is like.



— https://nitter.net/holleyro/status/2034624408032104510#m

lol


Mike Golic Jr (@mikegolicjr)

these Miami OH players are gonna be giving folks WORK at Lifetime in a few years.



— https://nitter.net/mikegolicjr/status/2034466394373525977#m

Welcome aboard.


Dan Dakich (@dandakich)

Miami(Oh) @MiamiOH_BBall is damn good



— https://nitter.net/dandakich/status/2034582252214947968#m
Join the Fearless NCAA Bracket Challenge. Winner gets 1k.  tournament.fantasysports.yah…

Same mother. How are they not brothers. Grew up in the same house.


the Dey (@RyanDeywho)

Not brothers. Different last names



— https://nitter.net/RyanDeywho/status/2034483994171973653#m

I don’t understand how there’s been no mention of Travis Steele’s brother tonight. What Steele has done at Miami and what John Groce has done at Akron amazing story. I believe their mom was at the game. Never on camera or discussed????
